DISCOVERY 612, PRESENT: JOSHUA A. RIDLESS, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY, GAIL PARNELL. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND REMOVAL OF UNTIMELY OBJECTIONS IS GRANTED. WHILE THE COURT DOES NOT FIND THAT THE OBJECTIONS HAVE BEEN WAIVED, THE COURT OVERRULES THE OBJECTIONS. DEFENDANTS ARE ORDERED TO PRODUCE FURTHER AND COMPLETE PRODUCTION WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS MOTION. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITIONS OF DEFENDANTS LAWRENCE BEAMEN AND CARMELLA PATTON IS MOOT AS THE PARTIES AGREED UPON NEW DATES FOR THE DEPOSITIONS. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE MOTION WAS BROUGHT WITHOUT SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION. SANCTIONS ARE IMPOSED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $500, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Depositions of Defendants Lawrence Beamen and Carmella Patton is moot as the parties agreed upon new dates for the depositions.
